server/internal/cli/reset_admin.go.reason: Admin reset command deletes from a fixed allowlisted table set.

server/internal/integrations/thirdparty/.reason: Third-party account list queries are static and can be generated by sqlc.
Third-party account secret reference update is a static query and can be generated by sqlc.
Third-party account write queries are static and can be generated by sqlc.

server/internal/logging/repository/repos.reason: Management log insert query is static and should use existing sqlc logging queries.
Management log page cursor query composes direction-specific paging clauses.
Management log list query composes optional filters and ordering.
Management log detail and prune queries are static outside pruning expression reuse.
Management log cursor-window query composes optional pagination clauses.

server/internal/permission/blacklist.go.reason: Blacklist repository queries are static CRUD and can be generated by sqlc.

server/internal/permission/whitelist.go.reason: Whitelist repository queries are static CRUD and can be generated by sqlc.

server/internal/plugins/configstore/repo.reason: Plugin config read query composes optional namespace and key filters.

server/internal/plugins/kvstore/reposito.reason: Plugin KV list query uses escaped prefix filtering and pagination.

server/internal/render/repository/reposi.reason: Render template load and existence checks are static queries.
Render plugin cleanup query composes variable plugin ID sets.
Render template list queries are static and can be generated by sqlc.
Render template local upsert and delete statements are static transaction queries.
Render template desired-state sync mixes transaction reads, deletes, and conditional updates.
Render template source-package validation update is static.
Render template version list query is static.

server/internal/storage/integrity.go.reason: Storage integrity uses SQLite PRAGMA quick_check.

server/internal/storage/snapshot.go.reason: Storage snapshot uses PRAGMA setup and VACUUM INTO maintenance SQL.

server/internal/storage/store_lifecycle..reason: Storage lifecycle runs WAL checkpoint maintenance.

server/internal/storage/store_open.go.reason: Storage open configures SQLite PRAGMA settings.

server/internal/storage/store_schema.go.reason: Storage migration runner executes schema files, records migrations, and inspects SQLite schema metadata.
